# Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat (new user-facing feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] perf (performance improvement)
- [ ] refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore (build / CI / tooling)

## Checklist

- [ ] `swift build` and `swift test` pass locally.
- [ ] For behavioural changes to `DripMeterCore`, tests added or updated under `Tests/DripMeterCoreTests/`.
- [ ] User-facing changes reflected in `README.md`.
- [ ] Architectural changes reflected in `CONTRIBUTING.md` (Project layout section).
- [ ] Commit subjects follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `perf:`, …).
